description_long: This vending machine features a robust, rectangular wooden exterior with a series of horizontal product shelves on the left and a control panel on the right. The top of the machine is adorned with a decorative arrangement of green and dark green artificial foliage, giving it a unique, eco-friendly appearance. The control panel includes a digital display, several buttons, and what appears to be a payment interface, all neatly integrated into the right side. The back and sides of the machine are plain, with the wood grain texture visible and the foliage spilling slightly over the edges. The front is the most detailed, with clear access to the shelves and controls, while the sides and rear are solid and unadorned. The overall design suggests a modern vending machine with a natural aesthetic, suitable for urban parks or eco-conscious public spaces.
description: A wooden vending machine with leafy foliage on top, featuring product shelves and a control panel with buttons and a display on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing product shelves, a digital control panel, payment interface, and leafy foliage on top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the depth of the machine and the overhanging foliage, with no visible controls or shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain wooden back with foliage spilling over the top edge, no interactive features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the machine's thickness and leafy top, with no controls or shelves visible.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular digital display panel is located on the upper right section of the front, with a light blue screen and several adjacent buttons.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the display panel, featuring what appear to be a card reader and several slots for coins or bills.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A set of rectangular buttons is arranged vertically next to the display panel, each likely corresponding to a product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide horizontal slot is located below the product shelves on the front, serving as the product retrieval area.
